notes: Generated at the end of cexamples.test.ts during vitest.
Includes visual captures from plotter-oriented bundled C examples and compiler feature checks that draw pixels.

testConsoleOutputs.testName: C Examples — Output Verification > "Mini Shell" supports vars, aggregates and RAM file redirection
testConsoleOutputs.output:
[compileAndRun]
=== MINI SHELL RAM ===
vars set add max min avg
$ vars
(no vars)
$ set a=42
a=42
$ set b=7
b=7
$ set c=9
c=9
$ add
58
$ max
42
$ min
7
$ avg
19.33
$ touch f
created f
$ hi>f
$ cat f
hi
$ touch s
created s
$ avg>s
$ cat s
19.33
$

testConsoleOutputs.testName: C Examples — Output Verification > "Mini Shell" reports missing files and capacity limits

=== MINI SHELL RAM ===
vars set add max min avg
$ cat z
no file z
$ x>z
no file z
$ touch a
created a
$ touch b
created b
$ touch c
created c
$ touch d
created d
$ touch e
file full
$ touch a
exists a
$ set a=1
a=1
$ set b=2
b=2
$ set c=3
c=3
$ set d=4
d=4
$ set e=5
var full
$ vars
a=1
b=2
c=3
d=4
$

saved notes

hello
# ls
p program 1p
f notes 5b
# free
253p
#
